{{Infobox construct
| name = Karoshan ships
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Karoshan]] ships are a diverse array of spacecraft utilized by the [[Karoshan Empire]], ranging from old, rusted vessels to high-end luxury cruisers and sleek private ships designed for speed rather than combat. Their aesthetic varies significantly; many are described as black and blocky, while others appear more organic with dark metal plating that glows blue-green. Some specialized vessels feature skeletal designs and green engine flames. A massive six-mile-long dreadnought serves as a primary flagship, representing a rare and devastating level of firepower within their military. These fleets are often piloted by mass-produced [[Nova-Bots]], though they can also be manned by individuals. Tactically, [[Karoshan forces]] have been used for military blockades, screening operations to protect their queen, and defensive maneuvers to allow other vessels to retreat. Their capabilities include emerging from [[Subspace]] and performing micro-dives for repositioning, though they have also been noted for using amateur formations that leave them vulnerable to fire.}}

== The Engineer ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|[[Karoshan ships]] are dark, blocky vessels bristling with guns.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c7">''The Engineer'', chapter 7</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|There are six hundred [[Karoshan ships]] remaining with the group.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c10">''The Engineer'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-02-the-engineer|There are black [[Karoshan ships]] hovering over the asteroid.<ref name="lh-02-the-engineer-c34">''The Engineer'', chapter 34</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== The Knight ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|Most [[Karoshan ships]] contained golden spots after the spell was cast.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c5">''The Knight'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== The Pilot ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Karoshan ships]] are black and rectangular.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c14">''The Pilot'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:The Engineer]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
